reviews.comment:
Baños muy limpios, buena atención con un inconveniente, quería pagar con el QR y el empleado de La Isla no me dejo, porque según él, tenía que haber escaneado el QR antes de que cortara la manguera, cosa que no me dijo antes.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean bathrooms, good service with one problem: I wanted to pay with the QR code and the employee at La Isla wouldn't let me, because according to him, I should have scanned the QR code before he turned off the hose, something he didn't tell me beforehand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNHRyWEtBEAE
